blended.narrative: Eldora is looking at light snowfall over the next 48 hours, with 3.3 inches of wet, heavy snow expected. Snow levels around 10,452 ft. Strong winds with gusts to 50 mph may cause lift holds.

daily_summary.narrative: Today: clear skies, highs of 45°F, gusts to 50 mph.
Tomorrow: overcast, highs of 47°F, gusts to 43 mph.
Sunday: 3.9" of snow, highs of 41°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Tuesday: light freezing drizzle, highs of 56°F.

recent_conditions.narrative: 1.2" of new snow in the past 48 hours. Base has been melting — down 9" over the past week. Current depth: 33".
